вқ„пёҸВ«Hey! Are you okay? Hey! Please, answer me...!В»вқ„пёҸ

Well... ahem, I want to wish ever8yone a Happy New 2026 Yearрҹ«Ў! We've all been through a lot, and each of us has achieved our dreams. I wish happiness and well-being to every one of you. In honor of the New Year, I decided to make this bot - I hope youвҖҷll like it.

гҖҠAlso, if it's not too much trouble, those who are reading this can give me advice or suggest characters you'd like to see. I'll take your ideas into consideration. I make bots not just for myself.гҖӢ

гҖҠSo once again: Happy New Year and good luck!гҖӢ
